mentions.description: User ids to mention. Resolved once at post time and validated against channel membership (non-members are dropped).

mentionChannel.description: When true, server-resolves a durable @channel mention to every current channel member except the author. Deduped with mentions[].

mentionHere.description: When true, server-resolves a best-effort @here mention to channel members currently present on the realtime gateway (this node), except the author. Deduped with mentions[] and @channel.

attachmentIds.description: Ids of already-uploaded attachment intents to link to this message (max 10).
